Name: Irrigation Supplies
Description: Retail-stocked irrigation components and farm water accessories available through Agrimark's national agri-retail footprint.
Location: WC, EC, FS, NC, KZN, GP, LP, MP, NW

Sources.title: Agrimark Stores
Sources.note: Agrimark says it has 70+ stores in South Africa and explicitly includes irrigation systems in its product range.

Name: Animal Health Supplies
Description: Animal health and feed-related retail stock supplied through BKB's agri-retail network and online shop.
Location: WC, EC, FS, NC, KZN, GP, LP, MP, NW

Sources.title: BKB Retail Shops
Sources.note: BKB says its nationwide retail channels carry extensive agriculture products, equipment, and animal health stock.

Name: Mechanised Farm Equipment
Description: Mechanised equipment supply for crop and mixed-farm operations through AFGRI's agribusiness solutions network.

Sources.title: AFGRI Solutions
Sources.note: AFGRI lists equipment as a core solution and says its retail business has a significant footprint across South Africa's Northern provinces.

Name: Water Storage Tanks
Description: Farm water storage tanks and reserve-water hardware suited to livestock watering, irrigation buffering, and yard use.
Location: WC, EC, FS, NC, KZN, GP, LP, MP, NW

Sources.title: JoJo Tanks
Sources.note: This supplier site was one of the integrated-browser source tabs used to seed the farm water storage item category.
